title: Pillowy German Sausage Stuffed Mitsuba
description: A savory twist on traditional German sausage, featuring mitsuba and a flavorful tagine spice blend.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spices
ingredients.notes: Use a pre-mixed tagine spice blend

instructions: Split the pillowy buns in half and place on a baking sheet.
Brush the tops with olive oil and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
While the buns are toasting, slice the mitsuba leaves and set aside.
Cook the German sausage in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the Moroccan spices to the skillet and stir to combine.
To assemble the sausages, place a cooked sausage half in each toasted bun and top with a few leaves of mitsuba.
Drizzle with melted butter and serve immediately.
